message:
Security: Add shell injection prevention in InstallSkillButton

Add SAFE_PROMPT_ID regex validation (/^[a-z0-9-]+$/) to
generateInstallCommand() to prevent shell injection attacks.

While prompt IDs from the registry are already validated by Zod schema,
this defensive check protects against:
- Malformed Prompt objects passed directly to the component
- Future code paths that might bypass registry validation
- Defense in depth against shell metacharacter injection

The validation throws an error for invalid IDs, which is caught by
the handleCopy try/catch and shows a user-friendly error toast.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
